reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Above all, Eduardo, one of the owners, a boss, needed water for the motorhome as well as fuel and he was concerned about solving my problems.

reviews.comment:
No engañen con que buscan mejorar, estuve 7 dias en San Martin y siempre un playero, un surtidor y colas lentisimas, son YPF deben mejorar esto en temporada siendo solo 2 estaciones en la zona.

(Translated by Google)
Don't be fooled by claims of improvement. I spent 7 days in San Martin and there was always one attendant, one pump, and incredibly slow queues. This is YPF; they need to improve this during peak season, especially since there are only two stations in the area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocV9QUzJBRRAB

reviews.comment:

Insufficient customer service staff, generating excessive wait times, average.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoM1lHbXh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Baños con fila todo el dia.
3 duchas, 4 inodoros. Para un camping de 300 personas.

No tiene mesas ni sillas,
Tenés que comer parado si no tenes mesas.

Mucho ruido en las carpas debido a la cercanía de la ruta 40 (1 metro)

Algunos enchufes no funcionan bien.

No lo recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
Bathrooms with lines all day.

3 showers, 4 toilets. For a campsite of 300 people.

No tables or chairs.
You have to eat standing up if there are no tables.

Very noisy in the tents due to its proximity to Route 40 (1 meter).

Some electrical outlets don't work properly.

I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoMVlfUGJnEAE
